heroSubTitle: Smart booking for patients. Powerful management tools for doctors & clinics.

features.featuresTitle: Fix the problems that cost you patients
features.featuresSubTitle: Every feature exists because a real clinic had a real problem.

bookSelf.title: Patients book themselves
bookSelf.desc: No phone calls. No back-and-forth. Patients pick their slot and you get notified instantly.

noDouble.title: Zero double bookings — ever
noDouble.desc: Every slot is locked the moment it's taken. No more 'sorry, that time is gone' calls.

dashboard.title: Your full clinic in one dashboard
dashboard.desc: Appointments, patient records, prescriptions and revenue — one screen, no spreadsheets.

reminders.title: Automatic patient reminders
reminders.desc: Patients get notified when their appointment is confirmed, changed, or completed.

prescriptions.title: Digital prescriptions
prescriptions.desc: Write and store prescriptions digitally. Full medical history per patient, always accessible.

multiDoctor.title: Multi-doctor ready
multiDoctor.desc: Add multiple doctors, each with their own schedule, speciality and availability.

step1.title: Choose a doctor
step1.desc: Browse specialists and view profiles easily.

footer.logoTitle: Providing world-class healthcare services with the best specialists in the field.
